taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Java Developer
core_skills: Java, Spring Boot, AWS, Distributed Systems, APIs
skill_match_scores: Java:1.0, Spring Boot:1.0, AWS:1.0, Distributed Systems:0.0, APIs:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong experience with Java-based backend development, Experience with Spring Boot and AWS, Solid understanding of distributed systems, APIs, and service-oriented architectures, Experience working on production systems with high availability and reliability requirements, Familiarity with modern CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and operational tooling, Ability to diagnose and resolve complex production issues, Strong communication skills and the ability to work effectively with onshore and offshore teams
preferred_quals: Experience with enterprise data platforms, data access layers, or federated data systems, Experience with NodeJS and SQL, Exposure to cloud-based infrastructure and platform services, Experience applying AI or automation to software engineering workflows (e.g., testing, code quality, operational tooling), Background supporting large-scale, business-critical applications
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and support core components of the Prism platform, primarily in a Java, Spring Boot, AWS based environment, Own and evolve critical infrastructure services that support firmwide data access, Partner closely with offshore developers to provide technical direction, code reviews, and production support coverage, Improve platform resiliency, scalability, and performance for high-volume, low-latency workloads, Expand AI-driven automation across development, testing, and operational workflows, Participate in incident response and root cause analysis for availability or performance issues, Contribute to long-term platform modernization and reduction of operational risk, Collaborate with application teams that consume Prism to ensure reliable and efficient data access patterns
job_summary: Wellington Management is a private partnership offering investment management capabilities across global capital markets. They are seeking a Software Engineer to join the Prism engineering team, focusing on core platform and infrastructure development for their enterprise data federation platform.
